case_title: SCIULLI, VITTORIO ANTONIO VS MELLO, MICHAEL MELLO MORTGAGE CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,370.00 FILED BY SCIULLI, VITTORIO ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT MELLO, MICHAEL MELLO MORTGAGE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPIES OF PLTFS CLAIM AND UNIFORM RESIDENTIAL LOAN APPLICATION SUBMITTED BY MICHAEL MELLO TO COURT RECEIVED AND FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-07-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-06-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL TO BE HEARD BY COMMISSIONER O'CONNOR.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MELLO, MICHAEL MELLO MORTGAGE CO.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-26-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-07-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 COMMISSIONER KAPLAN RECUSES HERSELF.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING MAILED TO PLTF RETURNED TO COURT: FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MELLO, MICHAEL MELLO MORTGAGE CO. (PLAINTIFF WISHES TO REFILE & NAME NEW DEFENDANT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
